channel.title: Privacies on Wayne Cater
channel.description: Recent content in Privacies on Wayne Cater

item.title: Privacy Policy for TypoTheGame
item.description: Last updated: March 10, 2026 Overview TypoTheGame (“the App”) is a macOS typing game developed by Wayne Cater. This policy describes how the App handles your data. Data Collection TypoTheGame does not collect, transmit, or share any personal data. All data stays on your device. The App stores the following data locally on your Mac using SwiftData: Leaderboard entries — Player names and scores you choose to save Word list — Custom words you add or modify for gameplay This data is stored only on your device and is never sent to any server or third party.

item.title: Privacy Policy for Road Sign Bingo
item.description: Last updated: March 27, 2026 Overview Road Sign Bingo (“the App”) is an iOS game developed by Wayne Cater. This policy describes how the App handles your data. Data Collection Road Sign Bingo does not collect, transmit, or share any personal data. All data stays on your device. If you grant location permission, the App records your location only at the moment you tap a road sign during gameplay. This location data is used solely to display a map of where you spotted signs after getting Bingo.
